ValidationRule.description: Prevent the user to change ownership outside their business development region
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISCHANGED( OwnerId ), ISBLANK( $User.BusinessDevelopmentRegions__c )=false, NOT(CONTAINS($User.TECH_TextBusinessDevelopmentRegions__c , Owner.TECH_TextBusinessDevelopmentRegions__c)), $User.BypassValidationRules__c = false, NOT($User.ProfileId = '00e58000000s3v6'), NOT($User.ProfileId = '00e58000000z6UE'), NOT($User.ProfileId = '00e58000000z6UC') )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You are not authorized to change the ownership of companies from other business regions. Please contact the Salesforce support team for assistance.
